prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET Red Top (SR20DET-R) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) for 350-400whp on E85 fuel, paired with a Tomei 264° camshaft set and a N1 oil pump for high-RPM reliability.

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 50mm wastegate dump tube and a custom 3.5-inch downpipe, mated to a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a Sard 760cc top-mount fuel rail with ID1000 injectors for precise fueling under high boost.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs, custom-valved for the Mistral’s R200 rear diff and multi-link suspension geometry, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear adjustable sway bars and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1025K) for reduced compliance.
estetica: Rocket Bunny Mistral-specific widebody kit (Pandem V2) with extended front fenders, custom rear quarter panels, and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler, all finished in Nissan’s original ‘Active Red’ (code: AY2) with a satin clear coat for contrast.

Custom front bumper lip by Garage Mak (Japan) with integrated DRLs using Osram LED modules (part #LE U15W) and a rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon with integrated twin 3-inch exhaust outlets for the HKS system, all in raw carbon fiber weave.

OEM+ interior refresh with Recaro SRD-E seats (Nissan Mistral-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts (color: Black/Red), paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel and a custom gauge pod by Defi (BF series) for oil pressure, boost, and EGT monitoring.
